title: Per-Origin Politeness, Concurrency, Retry Classification, and Adaptive Rate · Independent Program Trial
summary: An independent site owner provides a different origin, URL space, markup fault, indexing policy, accessibility need, resource budget, dynamic boundary, and failure condition and transfers per-origin politeness, concurrency, retry classification, and adaptive rate into a changed per-origin politeness and retry controller. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of per-origin politeness and retry controller with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through p…
objectives: Schedule requests by effective origin with minimum start spacing, stable crawler identity, robots and owner policy, and monotonic time.
Limit active work per origin and globally while accounting for redirects, browser resources, retries, and queued fairness.
Retry only transient, safe, replayable failures under an attempt and elapsed-time budget and stop on denial or policy signals.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Adaptive Rate Evidence
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: scraper-adaptive-rate-evidence-qd528s" that uses case 7514 to validate per-origin spacing, concurrency, transient retry, Retry-After, jitter, and adaptive rate evidence. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, contact sites, import or claim native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, or Playwright behavior, read or write host files, use credentials, launch browsers, schedule host jobs, or claim live accessibility, privacy, legal, load, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, the recorded stable package versions, fixed and malformed fixtures, fake transports, controlled local servers, authorized disposable target sites, representative browser profiles, privacy, security, accessibility and legal review, load, migration, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-adaptive-rate-evidence-qd528s
# Competency: scraper-adaptive-rate-evidence.
# Case 7514: a keyboard and screen-reader report review.
# Operating constraint: the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a block, private field, dangerous destination, or spreadsheet formula and stop or reject it.
def evidence_scraper_adaptive_rate_evidence_qd528s(origins: int = 3, minimum_spacing_ms: int = 800, maximum_origin_concurrency: int = 2, retry_budget: int = 3, policy_violations: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_qd528s = "qd528s-s825dq-7514"
    assert evidence_variant_qd528s
    evidence_axes_qd528s = (
        "authorizationqd528s",
        "url7514",
        "responses825dq",
        "treeqd528s7514",
        "frontier7514qd528s",
        "reports825dq7514",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_qd528s)) == 6
    if origins < 1 or minimum_spacing_ms < 0:
        return False, origins, "politeness-shape"
    if maximum_origin_concurrency < 1 or maximum_origin_concurrency > 4:
        return False, maximum_origin_concurrency, "origin-concurrency"
    if retry_budget < 0 or retry_budget > 5:
        return False, retry_budget, "retry-amplification"
    if policy_violations > 0:
        return False, policy_violations, "politeness-violation"
    assert maximum_origin_concurrency <= 4 and policy_violations == 0
    return True, minimum_spacing_ms, "polite-origin-controller"
